$schema.description: JSON Schema reference for editor support

apiKey.description: API key for AI requests. Overrides AI_API_KEY / OPENAI_API_KEY environment variables.

baseURL.description: Custom API base URL. Overrides AI_BASE_URL / OPENAI_BASE_URL environment variables. Not used in gemini mode.

model.description: AI model to use for generation.

fallbackModel.description: Fallback model used when the primary model returns a 429 (rate limit) error.

reasoningEffort.description: Thinking effort level for reasoning models.

mode.description: AI provider mode. 'custom' uses AI_* vars first, 'openai' prefers OPENAI_* vars, 'gemini' uses Google Gemini native SDK.

autoPush.description: Automatically push to remote after a successful commit.

oneOf.description: Set to false to disable the default Co-authored-by trailer.

coAuthor.description: Co-authored-by trailer appended to AI-generated commit messages. Defaults to 'git-ai-commit <git-ai-commit@users.noreply.github.com>'. Set to false to disable.
